svg.title: LagTrace plugin architecture
svg.desc: Data flow from Unity main thread through the sampler, Harmony patches, spike detector and plugin tracker, out to the five commands.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the Harmony patch prefix/postfix work in LagTrace?')
sendPrompt('How does the background stack sampler thread work?')
sendPrompt('How does LagTrace measure frame time for spike detection?')
sendPrompt('What does the Timings dictionary store?')
g.text: total / avg / max ms per method

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What data does the SamplerEngine accumulate?')
sendPrompt('How does LagTrace attribute samples to a specific plugin?')
sendPrompt('How does the spike ring buffer work?')
sendPrompt('What does /lagtop show and what arguments does it take?')
sendPrompt('What does /lagspike show and how is it different from /lagspike list?')
